description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and runs `bundle install` in a before_script for every job. Define the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Add a test stage with a `test` job that executes `bundle exec jekyll build -d test`, saves the `test` directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except `master`. Add a deploy stage with a `pages` job that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the `master` branch.
